message:
fix(streaming,tools): UTF-8 error recovery in SSE/exec streams, HTTP header parse optimization, file permission default

HTTP header boundary detection:
- http/client.rs: track search_start to avoid re-scanning the entire buffer
  on each read; only scan new data + 3-byte overlap for \r\n\r\n boundary

SSE UTF-8 recovery:
- sse.rs: after detecting incomplete UTF-8 sequence, store remainder in
  utf8_buffer; when new data arrives, combine and retry; when remainder
  is valid UTF-8, feed immediately via feed_to_pending() instead of
  buffering; new test validates recovery across multiple SSE frames

Exec stream UTF-8 handling:
- extension_dispatcher.rs: replace buggy two-path branch logic with
  unified loop parser; emit U+FFFD replacement char for invalid bytes,
  skip them, and continue parsing; handle incomplete sequences at buffer
  boundary by accumulating in partial buffer; new test for replacement
  char handling

File permission default:
- tools.rs: if original file permissions can't be read during edit,
  default to 0o644 (rw-r--r--) instead of tempfile's restrictive 0o600

- session.rs: remove unnecessary mut in test function signature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
